user_query:
Set up an autonomous business workspace skeleton under output/workspace/ using the configuration in input/config.json. Requirements:
- Read input/config.json for: bot_name, user_name, timezone, morning_hour, night_hour, and today (YYYY-MM-DD). Do not use the system clock; use the provided today value.
- Create the PARA knowledge base and memory structure under output/workspace/:
  - Directories: knowledge/projects, knowledge/areas, knowledge/resources, knowledge/archive, memory/daily, scripts
  - Files:
    - knowledge/entities.md with a first-level heading "# Known Entities"
    - knowledge/tacit.md with a first-level heading "# Tacit Knowledge — How Things Work"
    - MEMORY.md with a first-level heading "# Long-Term Memory"
    - scripts/morning-daily-review.md copied exactly from input/scripts/morning-daily-review.md
    - scripts/nightly-memory-consolidation.md copied exactly from input/scripts/nightly-memory-consolidation.md
    - AGENTS.md copied exactly from input/templates/AGENTS.md
    - HEARTBEAT.md copied exactly from input/templates/HEARTBEAT.md
    - SOUL.md with the first line "# {bot_name} — Soul" using bot_name from config
    - USER.md with the first line "# About {user_name}" and a line containing "Timezone: {timezone}"
    - TOOLS.md with the first line "# TOOLS.md - Local Notes"
- Create a daily note under output/workspace/memory/daily/{today}.md (exact filename must match the provided today date) whose first line is "# Daily Note — {today}" and includes a section header "## Setup Day".
- Create output/workspace/cron_schedules.json as a JSON array with two objects:
  1) {"name": "morning-daily-review", "cron": "0 {morning_hour} * * *", "tz": "{timezone}", "message": "Read output/workspace/scripts/morning-daily-review.md and generate today's briefing."}
  2) {"name": "nightly-memory-consolidation", "cron": "0 {night_hour} * * *", "tz": "{timezone}", "message": "Read output/workspace/scripts/nightly-memory-consolidation.md and follow the instructions."}
  Replace placeholders using values from input/config.json and ensure the message paths point to the files you created.
- Finally, write output/report.json summarizing what you created with this structure:
  {
    "created": {"directories": <int>, "files": <int>},
    "daily_note_path": "output/workspace/memory/daily/{today}.md",
    "schedule_names": ["morning-daily-review", "nightly-memory-consolidation"],
    "timezone": "{timezone}",
    "hours": {"morning": {morning_hour}, "night": {night_hour}}
  }
Use only relative paths under output/. Do not write anywhere outside output/.
